# Attestly - Compliance Software for Small Businesses

> Attestly is compliance form software for small businesses. Collect policy acknowledgments, employee handbook signatures, and fillable PDF compliance forms with audit-ready tracking. No signer accounts required.

## What Attestly Does

Attestly is a compliance software platform purpose-built for small businesses. It replaces manual processes and expensive enterprise tools for managing policy acknowledgments and compliance sign-offs. Organizations use it to:

- Send signature requests via email with secure one-click signing links
- Create fillable PDF compliance forms with AI-powered field detection
- Track employee acknowledgment completion across teams and departments
- Generate audit-ready PDF proof with timestamps and IP addresses
- Automate reminder emails for pending signatures
- Manage multiple compliance requirements in one dashboard

## Primary Category

Compliance software for small businesses

## Secondary Categories

- Compliance form software
- Policy acknowledgment software
- Employee acknowledgment tracking
- Fillable PDF compliance software
- No-login e-signature for internal use
- Audit-ready compliance tracking

## Key Features

- **No-Login Signatures**: Recipients sign without creating accounts or passwords
- **Fillable PDF Forms**: Upload PDFs and convert them into fillable compliance forms with AI field detection
- **Audit Trail**: Every signature includes timestamp, IP address, and browser info
- **Automated Reminders**: Set up automatic follow-ups for unsigned requests
- **PDF Export**: Generate legally defensible proof documents instantly
- **Team Management**: Invite team members and manage organization settings
- **Bulk Operations**: Send to multiple recipients, import from CSV

## Use Cases

- Annual policy acknowledgments (employee handbooks, code of conduct)
- NDA and confidentiality agreements
- Training completion confirmations
- Regulatory compliance documentation
- Vendor and contractor agreements
- Safety protocol acknowledgments
- Fillable PDF compliance forms

## Pricing

- **Free Trial**: 14 days, no credit card required
- **Starter**: $29/month - 100 recipients, 10 requirements
- **Pro**: $79/month - 500 recipients, unlimited requirements, custom branding
- **Enterprise**: Custom pricing for large organizations

## Contact

- Website: https://getattestly.com
- Email: hello@attestly.com

## Technical Details

- Built with React and TypeScript
- Secure cloud infrastructure
- SOC 2 Type II compliant practices
- Data encrypted at rest and in transit
- GDPR compliant
